mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inbound_order_item ( inbound_order_id, product_id, product_name_snapshot, specification_snapshot, unit_snapshot, quantity, unit_price, amount, remark ) VALUES ( #{inboundOrderId}, #{productId}, #{productNameSnapshot}, #{specificationSnapshot}, #{unitSnapshot}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{amount}, #{remark} )

INSERT INTO inbound_order_item ( inbound_order_id, product_id, product_name_snapshot, specification_snapshot, unit_snapshot, quantity, unit_price, amount, remark ) VALUES
( #{item.inboundOrderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productNameSnapshot}, #{item.specificationSnapshot}, #{item.unitSnapshot}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.amount}, #{item.remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, COALESCE(i.product_name_snapshot, p.product_name) AS productName, COALESCE(i.specification_snapshot, p.specification) AS specification, COALESCE(i.unit_snapshot, p.unit) AS unit, i.quantity, i.unit_price AS unitPrice, i.amount, i.remark FROM inbound_order_item i LEFT JOIN product p ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE i.inbound_order_id = #{inboundOrderId} ORDER BY i.id ASC

SELECT id, inbound_order_id, product_id, product_name_snapshot, specification_snapshot, unit_snapshot, quantity, unit_price, amount, remark, created_time, updated_time FROM inbound_order_item WHERE inbound_order_id = #{inboundOrderId} ORDER BY id ASC

select i.product_id as productId, COALESCE(i.product_name_snapshot, p.product_name) as productName, COALESCE(i.specification_snapshot, p.specification) as specification, COALESCE(i.unit_snapshot, p.unit) as unit, i.quantity, i.unit_price as purchasePrice, i.amount from inbound_order_item i left join product p on i.product_id = p.id where i.inbound_order_id = #{inboundOrderId} order by i.id asc
